moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues its thrilling knockout stages, with nations battling for a place in the semi-finals and final later this month.

angles.name: Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: The World Cup drama is heating up! Which team are you backing to make it through the quarter-finals this week?

angles.name: Match Day Excitement
angles.copy: Another massive World Cup match day ahead! Get ready for some nail-biting action as the tournament progresses.

angles.name: UK's View
angles.copy: The UK is gripped by World Cup fever! Who do you think has been the standout player of the tournament so far?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026: Second Week Action
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, is in full swing, with top players competing in the fourth round and quarter-finals on the iconic grass courts.

angles.name: Tennis Intensity
angles.copy: The intensity at Wimbledon is building! Who are your picks to reach the semi-finals this week?

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Centre Court drama. Soak up the atmosphere from the biggest tennis tournament in the world!

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Are there any British hopefuls left in the running at Wimbledon? Keep up with all the action!

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix 2026 takes place tomorrow, July 5th, at Silverstone, following today's qualifying sessions.

angles.name: Silverstone Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is tomorrow at Silverstone. Who's your money on for the win?

angles.name: Qualifying Recap
angles.copy: Qualifying for the British Grand Prix has set the grid! Tune in tomorrow for what promises to be an epic race.

angles.name: Home Race Hopes
angles.copy: The biggest race on the F1 calendar for UK fans is here! Wishing all the British drivers the best for tomorrow!

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival, one of the UK's biggest urban music festivals, kicks off tomorrow, July 5th, at Finsbury Park in London, running until July 7th.

angles.name: Wireless Weekend
angles.copy: Wireless Festival 2026 is almost here! Who are you excited to see at Finsbury Park this weekend?

angles.name: London's Big Gig
angles.copy: London is about to get loud! Wireless Festival brings the biggest names in urban music to the capital starting tomorrow.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing everyone heading to Wireless a fantastic weekend! Get ready for some unforgettable performances.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Continues This Week
moments.blurb: British Summer Time Hyde Park continues this week with a series of major headliners gracing the iconic London stage, running until July 14th.

angles.name: Hyde Park Live
angles.copy: Still time to catch some incredible live music at BST Hyde Park this week! Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: London's Summer Soundtrack
angles.copy: British Summer Time is providing the soundtrack to London's summer. What's been your favourite moment so far?

angles.name: Big Names in the Park
angles.copy: From rock legends to pop superstars, BST Hyde Park has it all. Don't miss the remaining shows this week!

moments.title: Latest Official UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated yesterday, Friday July 3rd, revealing the nation's new number one track and biggest movers.

angles.name: New Chart Topper
angles.copy: A new track has claimed the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart! Have you heard the new number one yet?

angles.name: Chart Rundown
angles.copy: Catch up on all the biggest hits and risers from this week's Official UK Singles Chart, updated yesterday!

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Time to update that weekend playlist! The latest UK Singles Chart is out, packed with fresh tunes.

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone, known for hits like 'Circles' and 'Rockstar', celebrates his 31st birthday today.

angles.name: Posty's Big Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to the one and only Post Malone! What's your favourite Posty track?

angles.name: Celebrate Post Malone
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Post Malone, turning 31 today! We're playing his biggest hits to celebrate.

angles.name: 31 Years of Posty
angles.copy: From 'White Iverson' to global superstar, Post Malone turns 31 today! Send him some birthday love!

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, the iconic frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 80s anthems like 'The Power of Love' and 'Hip to Be Square', turns 76 tomorrow.

angles.name: Power of Love Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Huey Lewis celebrates his 76th birthday! What's your favourite Huey Lewis & The News hit?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to 80s icon Huey Lewis, turning 76 tomorrow! Get ready for a flashback.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Celebrating Huey Lewis's 76th birthday tomorrow! His music still has 'The Heart of Rock & Roll'.

moments.title: RZA of Wu-Tang Clan Turns 57
moments.blurb: RZA, the influential rapper, producer, and de facto leader of the legendary Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow marks the 57th birthday of the mastermind himself, RZA of Wu-Tang Clan! What's your favourite Wu-Tang track?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating a true hip-hop legend! RZA turns 57 tomorrow. His influence is undeniable.

angles.name: Producer Extraordinaire
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to the incredible RZA! The beats he's crafted have shaped generations.

moments.title: 50 Cent's 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum selling rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent, famous for global hits like 'In Da Club', turns 51 on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Big 5-1 for 50
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your go-to 50 track?

angles.name: G-Unit General
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to the G-Unit General, 50 Cent! Turning 51 on Monday.

angles.name: Birthday Bangers
angles.copy: We're spinning 50 Cent's biggest bangers to get ready for his 51st birthday on Monday!

moments.title: Ringo Starr Turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, an icon of music history, celebrates his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Peace & Love Birthday
angles.copy: It's a big one! Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday. Send your 'Peace & Love' wishes to the legendary Beatle!

angles.name: Beatles Drummer
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Ringo Starr's 86th birthday this Tuesday! His rhythm defined a generation.

angles.name: 86 Years of Ringo
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global superstardom, Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

moments.title: Beck Celebrates 56th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American musician Beck, known for his eclectic and innovative style on tracks like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', turns 56 on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Beck
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to the unique and brilliant Beck on Wednesday! What's your favourite of his many sounds?

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating alternative icon Beck's 56th birthday this Wednesday. Still pushing boundaries!

angles.name: 56 Years of Genius
angles.copy: Beck turns 56 on July 8th! From folk to funk, his musical journey is incredible. What track defines him for you?

moments.title: Courtney Love Turns 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman, rock icon, and actress Courtney Love, a key figure in the 90s grunge scene, celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the incomparable Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track?

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Grunge Queen, Courtney Love, turning 62 this Thursday! Her impact on music is undeniable.

angles.name: 62 Years of Love
angles.copy: From Hole to Hollywood, Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th. A true rock legend!

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, and songwriter Jack White, best known as the frontman of The White Stripes, celebrates his 51st birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: White Stripes Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the incredible Jack White on Thursday! What's your favourite White Stripes song?

angles.name: Rock Visionary
angles.copy: Celebrating a modern rock visionary, Jack White, turning 51 this Thursday! From The White Stripes to solo brilliance.

angles.name: 51 Years of Rock
angles.copy: Jack White celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9th! His distinctive sound has left a huge mark on music.

moments.title: Perrie Edwards Turns 33
moments.blurb: Little Mix star and solo artist Perrie Edwards, known for her powerful vocals, celebrates her 33rd birthday next Friday, July 10th.

angles.name: Little Mix Birthday
angles.copy: Next Friday, Perrie Edwards from Little Mix turns 33! What's your favourite Little Mix or Perrie solo track?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy early 33rd birthday to pop princess Perrie Edwards next Friday! Get ready to celebrate.

angles.name: 33 Years Young
angles.copy: Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 10th! Send your well wishes to the talented singer.
